title: Regional Peace
description: Stop mob from spawning in a specific region.
body:
_Welcome to Heavenly Host Elementary School! But..._

This is simply a mod that allows you to stop mob from natural spawning **in a specific region**, which can protect dark buildings and so on.

The type of mob can be specified, e.g. monster, creature, ambient...

It is rather feature-incomplete now, but it is usable.

Usage: /peace <type> <radius> [< center >] [<dimension>]

Executing command without arguments to see full help.

Note: it is possible to do so in vanilla, by stacking monsters. However it is player-centered: if you have 70 monsters in your r=128 range then YOU will not spawn monsters in your r=128 range, thus disabling spawning in a region would be a sphere-covering problem, which is very complex and increases MSPT much. This mod is entity-centered and is very easy to understand and control.
